query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, startTimeEst, sport, publishedToFeed FROM games WHERE sport = 'MLB' ORDER BY gameDate DESC LIMIT 10; SELECT COUNT(*) as prop_count FROM mlb_strikeout_props;
